army_customisation.intro:
Army Customisation allows you to further individualise your force. Archetypes change how you build your army by moving around units in the Army Organisation Plan (AOP) or letting you take more of a unit than you would normally be allowed to. Legacies give access to armories and disciplines of legendary factions. Traits enhance your units with special abilities that they normally would not be able to have.

You may select up to the following:
0-1 Archetype, 0-1 Legacy, 0-2 Traits

If a Trait is taken, all models / units in the army must be upgraded with it, unless stated otherwise.

archetypes.name: Holy Vanguard
archetypes.description:
- Dominions can be taken as Troops.
- Only Dominion units count towards the 25% Troops limitation.
- All Dominion models must start the game as passengers inside a transport.

archetypes.name: Penitent Crusade
archetypes.description:
- Arco-flagellants and Repentia can be taken as Troops.
- For every 10 Arco-flagellant models one unit of Penitent Engines can be taken as Troops.
- Battle Sisters and Sisters Novitiate become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Shrine Wardens
archetypes.description:
- Celestia Sacresantis can be taken as Troops.
- Battle Sisters and Sisters Novitiate become Elite choices.
- Arco-flagellants, Repentia and Penitent Engines can not be taken at all.

legacies.name: Blind Faith
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Order of the Valorous Heart in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: Cleansing Flames
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Order of the Ebon Chalice in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: Faith Is Our Shield
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Order of the Argent Shroud in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: Honour The Martyrs
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Order of Our Martyred Lady in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: Tear Them Down
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Order of the Bloody Rose in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: The Emperor's Judgement
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Order of the Sacred Rose in the Order Armory.

legacies.name: The Holy Trinity
legacies.description: The army gains access to a third trait and must select these traits: Raging Fervour, Rites of Fire and Unshakeable Vengeance. All traits combined cost 10 points for each non-character units.

traits.name: Combined Conviction
traits.description: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Deeds, not Words
traits.description: The unit may treat all of its "Rapid Fire" weapons during its Activation as "Assault" weapons (f.e. Rapid Fire 1 becomes Assault 1).

traits.name: Devout Fanaticism
traits.description: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 to melee hit rolls until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Guided by the Emperor’s Will
traits.description: The unit can re-roll one armor penetration or wound roll per activation.

traits.name: Holy Wrath
traits.description: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 Strength until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Raging Fervour
traits.description: Inferno pistols gain 1,5" range, Meltas gain 3" range and Multi-melta gain 6" range.

traits.name: Rites of Fire
traits.description: Hand flamers gain 1,5" range, Flamers gain 3" range and Heavy flamers gain 6" range.

traits.name: Shield of Aversion
traits.description: The unit can reroll one armor save per battle round.

traits.name: The Blood of Martyrs
traits.description: If the unit is destroyed, it generates an additional Faith Point.

traits.name: The Emperor's Judgement
traits.description: If the unit performs an Act of Faith, roll 1D6. On a 5+, the Faith Point is refunded.

traits.name: Unshakable Vengeance
traits.description: The unit gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability with Bolt weapons. Does not apply to "Heavy" weapons.
